report_title: NSPL Status Report for EPE Review Meeting
client_owner: EPE Process Filters & Accumulators Pvt. Ltd.
iqra_role: Owner-side review / guidance / selective witness support, where applicable
progress_logic: Project Total > PO > Phase > Dispatch Trip > Site Receipt

exec.overall_position: Phase II site activities are under progress in released fronts. Phase III Unit II and Unit I work is under active manufacturing and release preparation. Phase IV has started in selected Unit II and Unit I fronts in early stages. The present delay is limited to the first roof-linked affected fronts only and is not being treated as a full-project delay.
exec.what_moved: Phase II site erection and secondary closure moved in released areas. Phase III Unit II first member groups moved further in fit-up / welding / release preparation. Phase III Unit I secondaries, sheeting support items, and bought-out item checking moved forward. Selected Phase IV items opened in early manufacturing stages.
exec.what_planned: Close the first Phase III release-ready lots in Unit II, complete the first Phase III roof-material handover set in Unit I, freeze the dispatch-to-site matching list, and close the next Phase II final torque front so the first roof front can move steadily.
exec.main_held: One quality point on first release / finish readiness, one manpower point on additional welding coverage, one document / clarification point on coating data closure, and one dispatch / site continuity point on matched trip planning remain open.
exec.main_commitments: Freeze Phase III first dispatch matching list, close the additional welder detail sheet, close the first roof-material handover set, identify the first final-torque-closed area, and submit the complete coating data note for the affected fronts.

assumption.intro: This example uses fixed project facts from the current controlled records and combines them with clearly stated illustration assumptions. It should be used only as a model for report drafting and meeting preparation.
assumption.drawn_from_basis: Tuesday review rhythm with one-week lookahead; Project Total > PO > Phase > Dispatch Trip > Site Receipt; total quantity 1192.27 MT; PO 2530014 at 1043.17 MT; PO 2530015 at 149.10 MT; roof sheeting as a site activity; final site painting only after final torque in released areas; NSPL responsibility for execution status and records; IQRA owner-side review / guidance / selective witness support.
assumption.illustration_only: Phase II site activities under progress; Phase III Unit II and Unit I under active manufacturing / release preparation; Phase IV started in selected early fronts; one quality point, one manpower point, one clarification point, one dispatch / site continuity point, and one roof-linked one-week delay; all specific commitment rows, dates, and tentative completion dates shown in this example.

nspl_role: Issued by NSPL Management (prepared by NSPL QA/QC and Planning)
iqra_role: Director, Iqra Quality Services Pvt. Ltd.
